title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at Bank of Baroda
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bank of Baroda! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bank of Baroda:
Bank of Baroda is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of Baroda!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
